title: Ubiquiti UX7, UniFi Express 7
description: UniFi Express 7 is a super-compact 10-gigabit UniFi Cloud Gateway with an integrated WiFi 7 AP . For network connectivity, it features (1) 10Gbps WAN port and (1) 2.5Gbps LAN port. The built-in Tri-Band WiFi 7 AP supports the latest 802.11be standard, delivering speeds of up to 5.7 Gbps on the 6 GHz band, 4.3 Gbps on the 5 GHz band, and 688 Mbps on the 2.4 GHz band, with advanced WPA3 encryption . With the pre-installed UniFi Network application, the router enables management of up to 30 UniFi… Super-compact design High performance â up to 2.3 Gbps throughput with IDS/IPS support 10G WAN + 2.5G LAN Built-in Tri-Band WiFi 7 AP UniFi Network for managing up to 30 UniFi devices VPN support, including site-to-site VPN Device Power adapter Power cable Patch cable
